wikitext.*:
:''For the Finchie Bear Plushies, see [[Exclusive Items]]'' 
[[File:LegendaryPlushies.jpg|thumb]]
The '''Legendary Plushie Collection''' is a collection of exclusive plushies of Finch [[Birb|birbs]] and NPCs released in January 2023. 

=== Availability ===
Legendary Plushies can be purchased in [[Mr. Prickles' Shop]] using [[Rainbow Stones|rainbow stones]]. Plushies appear in the rare item rotation but appear less frequently than other items. Because they are very rare, they also cost a greater number of stones. The collection was released in part for users who had accumulated a large amount of rainbow stones, as well as a long-term incentive.  

Plushies can be sold back to the shop for half price.
